body:
## Problem
MetalForge has 8 gear brand landing pages (`/brands/<slug>`) at sitemap priority **0.8**, but there are **zero brand-specific LLM markdown files** in `public/llms/`. AI crawlers (GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot) have no machine-readable brand data to cite.

Current `public/llms/` directory has drummer-level markdown files but no brand directory. When an AI asks "What metal drummers use Meinl cymbals?" or "Which pro drummers endorse Pearl?", MetalForge is not citable because there's no structured brandâ†’drummer mapping in the LLM surface.

The 8 brands declared in `api/sitemap.js` (`gearBrands` array): `tama`, `pearl`, `dw`, `ludwig`, `mapex`, `meinl`, `zildjian`, `paiste`.

## Fix
Create `public/llms/brands/` directory with one `.md` file per brand. Each file follows this structure (example: meinl.md):

```markdown
# Meinl Cymbals â€” Metal Drummer Endorsers

Meinl is a German cymbal brand founded in 1951, widely used in metal drumming for dark, dry sound profiles.

## Metal Drummers Who Use Meinl

- Tomas Haake (Meshuggah) â€” Meinl Byzance series; Dark Ride 22", Custom Dark Crashes
- Mario Duplantier (Gojira) â€” Meinl Classics Custom Dark series
- Ray Luzier (Korn) â€” Meinl Byzance series
- Gene Hoglan (Death, Testament) â€” Meinl Byzance Jazz series

## Key Meinl Product Lines for Metal

- Byzance â€” Turkish bronze, dark warm tones; pro-level
- Classics Custom Dark â€” machine-hammered, brilliant finish; aggressive attack
- Byzance Extra Dry â€” extremely dry, short sustain; Meshuggah-style sound

## FAQ

Q: What cymbals does Tomas Haake use?
A: Tomas Haake uses Meinl Byzance series cymbals, including a 22" Byzance Dark Ride and 18"/19" Dark Crashes.

Q: What Meinl cymbals are best for metal?
A: For aggressive metal, Meinl Byzance Extra Dry or Classics Custom Dark offer fast response and short sustain.
```

**Files to create:** `public/llms/brands/meinl.md`, `zildjian.md`, `paiste.md`, `tama.md`, `pearl.md`, `dw.md`, `ludwig.md`, `mapex.md`

Also add entries to `public/llms.txt` linking to each new brand file so crawlers discover them.

Source data: pull endorser lists from the existing `endorsementDrummers` data in the frontend. Each file should list all MetalForge-catalogued drummers who use that brand, with product-line specifics pulled from their gear objects.

## Estimated organic uplift
Brand-specific LLM files fill a zero-coverage gap in the AI citation surface. When AI systems answer "which metal drummers endorse Meinl?" or "what Tama kit does Lars Ulrich use?", MetalForge becomes the authoritative cited source rather than Reddit threads or manufacturer pages. Indirect SERP uplift: AI Overview citations drive branded queries back to MetalForge.

## Verify
1. `curl https://metalforge.io/llms/brands/meinl.md` â†’ returns markdown content
2. `curl https://metalforge.io/llms/brands/tama.md` â†’ returns markdown content
3. All 8 brand files accessible at `/llms/brands/<slug>.md`
4. `/llms.txt` contains links to all 8 brand files
5. Files are plain markdown (no JS rendering required)

## Done
8 brand LLM markdown files live at `/llms/brands/<slug>.md`, all linked from `/llms.txt`.
title: SEO batch: add per-brand LLM markdown files â€” 8 gear brands with zero AI citation surface (/llms/brands/<slug>.md)
